title: Missing Balance Check in withdraw() Enables Exploit
reason: Merged into F-001 as the same root cause and exploit path; keeping it separate would double-count the underflow/drain issue.

title: RescueToken Allows Owner to Steal Staking Tokens
reason: Not supported by the code. For staking tokens, `rescueToken()` enforces that post-transfer balance stays at least `_totalSupply`; if `_amount` exceeds the actual balance, the ERC20 `transfer` reverts, so there is no demonstrated drain path.

title: getReward() Mints Tokens Without Checking Reward Token Supply
reason: This is a symptom of the shared mint-cap insolvency already captured in F-002, not a separate root cause.
